data.content:
Now I have the full picture. Here's the analysis and modernization:

**Legacy patterns identified (14 total):**

| # | Legacy Pattern | Resolution |
|---|---------------|------------|
| 1 | `<Project ToolsVersion="15.0" xmlns="...">` | â†’ `<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">` |
| 2 | Manual `Microsoft.Common.props` import | Implicit in SDK |
| 3 | Explicit `Configuration`/`Platform` defaults | SDK provides defaults |
| 4 | `ProjectGuid` | No longer needed |
| 5 | `RootNamespace` = project name | SDK default |
| 6 | `AssemblyName` = project name | SDK default |
| 7 | `TargetFrameworkVersion` `v4.7.2` | â†’ `TargetFramework` `net472` |
| 8 | `FileAlignment` | Default, removable |
| 9 | `AutoGenerateBindingRedirects` | Default / no-op for Library |
| 10 | `Deterministic` | SDK default is `true` |
| 11 | Debug/Release `PropertyGroup`s | SDK provides sensible defaults |
| 12 | Explicit framework `<Reference>` items | Implicit in SDK for .NET Framework |
| 13 | Explicit `<Compile Include="...">` items | SDK uses file globs automatically |
| 14 | Manual `Microsoft.CSharp.targets` import | Implicit in SDK |
| 15 | `Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs` | SDK auto-generates; move metadata to `.csproj` |

Applying the modernization now:

arguments.old_str:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Project ToolsVersion="15.0" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003">
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props" Condition="Exists('$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props')" />
  <PropertyGroup>
    <Configuration Condition=" '$(Configuration)' == '' ">Debug</Configuration>
    <Platform Condition=" '$(Platform)' == '' ">AnyCPU</Platform>
    <ProjectGuid>{12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012}</ProjectGuid>
    <OutputType>Library</OutputType>
    <RootNamespace>LegacyApp</RootNamespace>
    <AssemblyName>LegacyApp</AssemblyName>
    <TargetFrameworkVersion>v4.7.2</TargetFrameworkVersion>
    <FileAlignment>512</FileAlignment>
    <AutoGenerateBindingRedirects>true</AutoGenerateBindingRedirects>
    <Deterministic>true</Deterministic>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <PropertyGroup Condition=" '$(Configuration)|$(Platform)' == 'Debug|AnyCPU' ">
    <DebugSymbols>true</DebugSymbols>
    <DebugType>full</DebugType>
    <Optimize>false</Optimize>
    <OutputPath>bin\Debug\</OutputPath>
    <DefineConstants>DEBUG;TRACE</DefineConstants>
    <ErrorReport>prompt</ErrorReport>
    <WarningLevel>4</WarningLevel>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <PropertyGroup Condition=" '$(Configuration)|$(Platform)' == 'Release|AnyCPU' ">
    <DebugType>pdbonly</DebugType>
    <Optimize>true</Optimize>
    <OutputPath>bin\Release\</OutputPath>
    <DefineConstants>TRACE</DefineConstants>
    <ErrorReport>prompt</ErrorReport>
    <WarningLevel>4</WarningLevel>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Reference Include="System" />
    <Reference Include="System.Core" />
    <Reference Include="System.Data" />
    <Reference Include="System.Xml" />
    <Reference Include="System.Xml.Linq" />
    <Reference Include="Microsoft.CSharp" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Compile Include="Calculator.cs" />
    <Compile Include="StringHelper.cs" />
    <Compile Include="Properties\AssemblyInfo.cs" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildToolsPath)\Microsoft.CSharp.targets" />
</Project>
arguments.new_str:
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">

  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net472</TargetFramework>
    <Description>A legacy-style project for modernization testing</Description>
    <Company>TestCo</Company>
    <Copyright>Copyright Â© 2024</Copyright>
    <Version>1.0.0.0</Version>
    <AssemblyVersion>1.0.0.0</AssemblyVersion>
    <FileVersion>1.0.0.0</FileVersion>
  </PropertyGroup>

</Project>

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Remove legacy AssemblyInfo.cs and Properties dir

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Remove legacy AssemblyInfo.cs and Properties dir

data.reasoningText:
Now I have a clear picture of the legacy project. Let me identify all the legacy patterns and modernize it to SDK-style format.

Legacy patterns found:
1. **Old-style `<Project>` element** with `ToolsVersion` and `xmlns` â€” SDK-style uses `<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">`
2. **Manual `Microsoft.Common.props` import** (line 3) â€” handled automatically by SDK
3. **Explicit `Configuration` and `Platform` defaults** (lines 5-6) â€” SDK provides these defaults
4. **`ProjectGuid`** (line 7) â€” no longer needed


5. **`RootNamespace` and `AssemblyName`** (lines 9-10) â€” SDK defaults to the project name, so these are redundant
6. **`TargetFrameworkVersion` v4.7.2** (line 11) â€” needs to become `TargetFramework` with `net472`
7. **`FileAlignment` and `AutoGenerateBindingRedirects`** (lines 12-13) â€” these are defaults that can be removed
8. **`Deterministic`** (line 14) â€” SDK already defaults to true
9. **Debug/Release configurations** (lines 16-31) â€” the SDK provides sensible defaults for debug symbols, optimization levels, output paths, and warning levels, so these property groups are unnecessary
10. **Framework assembly references** (lines 33-40) â€” implicitly handled by the SDK for .NET Framework projects
11. **Explicit `<Compile>` items** (lines 41-45) â€” the SDK uses glob patterns automatically
12. **`Microsoft.CSharp.targets` import** (line 46) â€” the SDK manages this
13. **`Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs`** â€” the SDK auto-generates assembly attributes, so I can move that metadata into the project file properties instead

Now I'm going to modernize this project file.

I'm creating a minimal SDK-style project file that declares the target framework and moves assembly metadata like description, company, copyright, and version information into the PropertyGroup, eliminating the need for a separate AssemblyInfo.cs file. The SDK handles defaults for OutputType and RootNamespace, so those don't need to be explicit.

data.content:
**Done.** The project went from **47 lines â†’ 13 lines**. Here's what changed:

- **Replaced** the old-style `<Project>` root with `Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk"`, which eliminates both manual imports (`Microsoft.Common.props`, `Microsoft.CSharp.targets`)
- **Removed** all boilerplate: `ProjectGuid`, `Configuration`/`Platform` defaults, `FileAlignment`, `Deterministic`, `AutoGenerateBindingRedirects`, `OutputType` (Library is default)
- **Removed** Debug/Release `PropertyGroup`s â€” SDK provides identical defaults
- **Removed** explicit `<Compile>` items â€” SDK globs `**/*.cs` automatically
- **Removed** framework `<Reference>` items â€” implicit for `net472`
- **Deleted** `Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs` â€” metadata moved to `<Description>`, `<Company>`, `<Copyright>`, `<Version>`, `<AssemblyVersion>`, `<FileVersion>` in the project file (SDK auto-generates the assembly attributes)
- **Converted** `TargetFrameworkVersion` `v4.7.2` â†’ `TargetFramework` `net472`
